title: Since Apr2012-SP1 !TypeException:user.s11_1[59]:'bat.reverse' undefined in: _89:any := bat.reverse(_86:wrd)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_schema.data_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_schema.data_table (id, value) VALUES (1, 'Sample data');
CREATE TABLE test_schema.related_table (ref_id INT, description TEXT, FOREIGN KEY (ref_id) REFERENCES test_schema.data_table (id));
INSERT INTO test_schema.related_table (ref_id, description) VALUES (1, 'Related data');
SELECT value FROM test_schema.data_table WHERE id IN (SELECT ref_id FROM test_schema.related_table);
